title: The Mandela Catalogue Skin Pack
description: Ever wanted to look like an alternate in minecraft? Well now you can!
body:
# Info
This is a resource pack designed to be used with Legacy4J/LegacySkins, without those mods, this pack does basically nothing.
## Skins
### Act 1
| ID  | Episode | Name | ✅/❌ |
| --- | ------- | ---- | ------ |
| 000 | overthrone | Shepard (Red) |❌|
| 001 | overthrone | Shepard (Blue) |❌|
| 002 | overthrone | Gabriel (True) |❌|
| 003 | overthrone | Mary |❌|
| 004 | overthrone | Joseph |❌|
| 005 | overthrone | Gabriel (False) |❌|
| 006 | Vol. 1 | Nicholas Beringer (Human) |✅|
| 007 | Vol. 1 | Nicholas Beringer (Alternate) |✅|
| 008 | Vol. 1 [RESORED EDITION] | Nicholas Beringer (Human) |✅|
| 009 | Vol. 1 [RESORED EDITION] | Nicholas Beringer (Alternate) |✅|
